ddls:
CREATE TABLE "species_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species record */,
  "new_code" TEXT /* New code assigned to the species for identification */,
  "old_code" TEXT /* Old codes used for the species (comma-separated) */,
  "scientific_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the species */,
  "taxa" TEXT /* Taxonomic classification of the species (e.g., Bird, Rodent) */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the species (if available) */,
  "unknown" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the species presence is unknown */,
  "rodent" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the species is a rodent */,
  "shrubland_affiliated" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the species is affiliated with shrublands */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the geographical location of the observation */,
  "observation_date" TEXT /* Date of the species observation */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who made the observation */,
  "habitat" TEXT /* Habitat where the species was observed */,
  "population_estimate" INTEGER /* Population estimate of the species at the observation location */,
  "conservation_status" TEXT /* Conservation status of the species */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_records_new_code FOREIGN KEY ("new_code") REFERENCES species_codes ("code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_records_taxa FOREIGN KEY ("taxa") REFERENCES taxa ("taxa_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_records_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_records_old_code FOREIGN KEY ("old_code") REFERENCES species_codes ("code")
)

CREATE TABLE "taxa" (
  "taxa_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each taxonomic classification */,
  "taxa_name" TEXT /* Name of the taxonomic classification (e.g., Bird, Rodent) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the taxonomic classification */,
  "parent_taxa_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent taxonomic classification */,
  "kingdom" TEXT /* Kingdom of the taxon (e.g., Animalia, Plantae) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("taxa_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species_codes" (
  "code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each code */,
  "code" TEXT /* Code assigned to the species */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of code (e.g., new, old) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the code */,
  "taxa_id" INTEGER /* ID of the taxonomic classification */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the code */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the code was created */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the code is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species_common_names" (
  "common_name_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each common name record */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species record */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the species */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the common name */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the common name */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the common name was added */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("common_name_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_common_names_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_common_names_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES species_records ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata record */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species record */,
  "unknown" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the species presence is unknown */,
  "rodent" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the species is a rodent */,
  "shrubland_affiliated" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the species is affiliated with shrublands */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the geographical location of the metadata */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who provided the metadata */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the metadata was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Last date when the metadata was modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_metadata_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES species_records ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_metadata_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Last date when the user logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the record */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to access the record (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES species_records ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version record */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species record */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the record */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "version_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., addition, modification, deletion) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_versions_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES species_records ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
